Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lightning Spear]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Leah carries the Lightning Spear in her right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Leah holds a tall Lightning Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — A Lightning Spear is resting against a wall near Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Zakareth's daughter has kept his Lightning Spear for weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — King Zakareth wields the Lightning Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — The Lightning Spear is a weapon that can blast through tiles and ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Leah can pull the Lightning Spear out of nowhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Lightning Spear is a weapon held by King Zakareth the Sixth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — King Zakareth catches a Lightning Spear in his palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Lightning Spear is a weapon used by Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah's father held the Lightning Spear in an iron grip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Lightning Spear was used to attack King Zakareth.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
